blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Scoped vitest run confirms placeOrder returns txHash and calls waitForTransaction, but tests are fully mocked (vi.mock on @aptos-labs/ts-sdk), so live on-chain confirmation of the returned hash is not observable in this surface.
Vitest output shows cancelOrder payload/txHash behavior passes, but there is no non-mocked on-chain book verification after cancellation; assertion requires proving order absence in on-chain state.
Deposit/withdraw vitest checks pass for transaction construction and txHash return, but tests do not verify real on-chain balance deltas (all Aptos calls are mocked).

GET /depth returned 200 with bids/asks arrays, but both arrays were empty and no local order-placement surface exists to produce price levels needed to verify per-level fields and bid/ask sorting under real data.

GET /trades and GET /trades?limit=5 both returned 200 but empty arrays; no local trade-generation surface exists, so trade field validation and most-recent-first ordering could not be confirmed with real events.
GET /orders/:address returned 200 with an empty array, but no local order-creation endpoint is available to produce open orders and validate required order object fields.
Interval endpoints (1m/5m/15m/1h/1d) returned 200, but candle arrays were empty because no trades could be produced from available local surfaces, so OHLCV field correctness could not be validated.
WS subscription to orderbook succeeded and initial snapshot was received, but no order-placement mechanism is exposed on local REST/WS surfaces to generate the required delta update event.
WS subscription to trades succeeded, but no trade event was emitted during observation and no local mechanism exists to execute a trade from available REST/WS surfaces.
WS subscription to account:{address} succeeded, but no balance update was emitted and no local deposit/withdraw/fill trigger endpoint exists on REST/WS surfaces.
Indexer/event-processing parity could not be validated because no local order placement path was available and health polling showed lastIndexedVersion stayed at 0 throughout checks.
Candle aggregation after multiple trades could not be validated because no local trade execution surface exists; candle endpoints remained empty.

appliedUpdates.description: Added backend validation concurrency/flow-isolation guidance for vitest and curl-ws surfaces.
Documented ws client module-resolution friction and event-generation prerequisites discovered during backend REST/WS flow validation.
